name: Peach Napoleons
recipeIngredient: 1 Sheet Pepperidge Farm Puffed Pastry Sheets
recipeInstructions:
FILLING
1 lb peaches, pitted and sliced
3 tbsp granulated sugar
3 tbsp lemon juice
WHIPPED CREAM
1 cup heavy whipping cream
1/2 cup powdered sugar
1/2 tsp almond extract
CARAMEL SAUCE
2 tbsp butter
3/4 cup granulated sugar
1/2 tsp vanilla
1/2 cup heavy whipping cream
Crust: sheet Pepperidge Farm Puffed Pastry Sheets Defrost and place on a floured surface. Roll out to measure 9 x 12 inches. Cut into 6 rectangles, each measuring 3 x 6 inches. Place on an oiled baking sheet. Pierce all pieces with a fork. Brush each pastry with 1/2 tsp milk.
Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
WHIPPED CREAM: Whip the ingredients together until nearly double in volume and soft peaks form. Keep chilled until ready to assemble.
CARAMEL SAUCE: Combine all ingredients in a small, heavy saucepan and cook on high heat until the sugar melts and the mixture begins to bubble at the edges. Remove immediately from heat. Whisk in the whipping cream very slowly. Allow to cool.
TO ASSEMBLE:
With a sharp knife, carefully split each pastry into 2 layers. Place one layer on a plate, spoon some of the whipped cream mixture on top. Place the second pastry layer over the peaches. Dust with powdered sugar and serve. Repeat with remaining pastries.
